sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.ZBID, t1.CR00321001, t1.CR00322001, t1.CR00323001, t1.CR00324001, t1.CR00325001, t1.CR00326001, t1.CR00327001, t1.CR00327001_ZHMC, t1.CR00328001, t1.CR00329001, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.SYS_APPLICATION_ID, t1.VERSION, t1.OPERATION_TYPE_, t1.SECRET_LEVEL,

mapper.insert:
insert into CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO
ID,
ZBID,
CR00321001,
CR00322001,
CR00323001,
CR00324001,
CR00325001,
CR00326001,
CR00327001,
CR00327001_ZHMC,
CR00328001,
CR00329001,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
SECRET_LEVEL,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00321001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00322001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00323001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00324001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00325001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00326001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00327001,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00327001Zhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{cr00328001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{cr00329001,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO( ID , ZBID , CR00321001 , CR00322001 , CR00323001 , CR00324001 , CR00325001 , CR00326001 , CR00327001 , CR00327001_ZHMC , CR00328001 , CR00329001 , CREATED_BY , CREATED_DEPT , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ORG_IDENTITY , SYS_APPLICATION_ID , VERSION , OPERATION_TYPE_ , SECRET_LEVEL )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00321001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00322001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00323001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00324001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00325001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00326001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00327001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00327001Zhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.cr00328001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.cr00329001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ZBID = #{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00321001 = #{cr00321001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00322001 = #{cr00322001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00323001 = #{cr00323001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00324001 = #{cr00324001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00325001 = #{cr00325001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00326001 = #{cr00326001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00327001 = #{cr00327001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00327001_ZHMC = #{cr00327001Zhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00328001 = #{cr00328001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00329001 = #{cr00329001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ZBID = #{item.zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00321001 = #{item.cr00321001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00322001 = #{item.cr00322001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00323001 = #{item.cr00323001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00324001 = #{item.cr00324001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00325001 = #{item.cr00325001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00326001 = #{item.cr00326001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00327001 = #{item.cr00327001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00327001_ZHMC = #{item.cr00327001Zhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CR00328001 = #{item.cr00328001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CR00329001 = #{item.cr00329001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.delete:
delete from CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CMJT_PAY_RECE_INFO t1 USING dual ON(t1.ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE
ZBID = #{zbid,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00321001 = #{cr00321001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00322001 = #{cr00322001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00323001 = #{cr00323001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00324001 = #{cr00324001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00325001 = #{cr00325001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00326001 = #{cr00326001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00327001 = #{cr00327001,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00327001_ZHMC = #{cr00327001Zhmc,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CR00328001 = #{cr00328001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CR00329001 = #{cr00329001,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
OPERATION_TYPE_ = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
ID,
ZBID,
CR00321001,
CR00322001,
CR00323001,
CR00324001,
CR00325001,
CR00326001,
CR00327001,
CR00327001_ZHMC,
CR00328001,
CR00329001,
CREATED_BY,
CREATED_DEPT,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ORG_IDENTITY,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
VERSION,
OPERATION_TYPE_,
SECRET_LEVEL,
